items.title: Just $16 today gets you this Anker adapter that turns one wall outlet into six and adds additional USB ports
items.summary:
Anker 10-in-1 outlet extender with USB ports

Buy for $16 (Reg. $20)

What we love

This Anker wall outlet extender adds six AC outlets across the top, along with two USB-C and two USB-A ports that can deliver up to 20W of charging power. It’s a convenient option for spaces where you need to power and charge multiple devices at the same time, while the flush wall-hugging design helps keep desks and countertops looking less cluttered overall. Its compact size also makes it easy to pack for travel.

items.title: Amazon’s eero 7 and Pro 6E mesh Wi-Fi routers hit lowest prices of the year today from $140
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops a single pack of the eero Pro 7 mesh Wi-Fi router down to $139.99 shipped once you enter promo code EERO7 during checkout. This is one of the latest eero routers you can buy right now with support for Wi-Fi 7. It typically goes for $170, but the promo code takes $30 off that price to mark the return of the lowest price we tracked for it this year. Only once before today have we seen this model go for less, and it’s now within just $5 of that price. Similarly, you can also snag the 3-pack of eero’s Pro 6E Wi-Fi mesh system down at $379.99 shipped with code EXTENDPRO6E, which is also the lowest we have seen it fetch this year. Best Buy is also matching the prices for these routers today – eero 7 and eero Pro 6E 3-pack – as part of its Deals of the Day offers, be sure to snag them while the prices are hot. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Still live: Score Star Fox Switch 2 pre-orders at $10 off (Amazon ‘Pre-order Price Guarantee’)
items.summary:
Nintendo just announced an official price hike coming to Switch 2, that’s not good. Nintendo also just official unveiled the new StarFox game and pre-orders are already seeing a deal at Amazon and Walmart. This is good. The physical copy of the new N64 remake is actually carrying a $60 MSRP, and you can already secure a copy down at $49.99 courtesy of Walmart or Amazon:

  • Star Fox Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60) | Amazon
  • Star Fox Switch 2 $50 (Reg. $60) | Walmart

This effectively just the same price as the digital copy’s $50 MSRP, but if you want a boxed edition this is likely going to be the best price we see ahead of launch in late June (the Amazon price guarantee will ensure you pay the lowest price it drops to between now and then anyway). 

Head below for the rest of this week’s best Switch and Switch 2 game deals. 

Surprise Star Fox Nintendo Direct starts now! Officially releases this summer [Updated]
